demo.title: recover-what-youre-owed.sh
demo.code:
# Draft a demand letter to recover a wrongly-withheld deposit ($0.10, paid from your wallet)
bankr x402 call "https://legalpulse-rho.vercel.app/api/legal/letter?type=demand&situation=landlord+kept+full+1500+deposit+no+itemized+list&state=CA&amount=1500&outcome=full+refund"

# "Is my visa on track?" — decode a stuck USCIS case
bankr x402 call "https://immigrationpulse.vercel.app/api/status?receipt=MSC2190012345&form=I-485"

# What VA disability compensation is this veteran owed? (grounded in the VA rating schedule)
bankr x402 call "https://vetpulse-five.vercel.app/api/vet/disability?conditions=tinnitus,PTSD,sleep+apnea&service_era=OIF"

# Am I underpaid? Salary benchmark from BLS/OECD/ILO data
bankr x402 call "https://careerpulse-steel.vercel.app/api/career/salary?title=Product+Manager&location=Austin,TX&yoe=6"

# Cheapest way to send $500 to the Philippines (true fee + FX markup)
bankr x402 call "https://remittancepulse.vercel.app/api/remit/compare?from=USA&to=Philippines&amount=500"

setup: Fund your Bankr wallet with a little USDC on Base — calls settle per-request, priced per endpoint ($0.05-$0.25, most ~$0.10).
Call any endpoint with `bankr x402 call <url>`; inspect the schema first with `bankr x402 schema <url>`.
Almost every param is optional free-text; pass `lang=<BCP-47 code>` for a response in any language. Browse the full hub at https://mcp-pulsenetwork.vercel.app
